segments.speaker: OWAI
segments.line: Ladies and gentlemen, welcome aboard. We'll be landing in about an hour.
segments.visual_cue: Medium shot of OWAI, expression intense and focused.

segments.speaker: TOM
segments.visual_cue: Wide shot of OWAI, smiling at the passengers.

segments.speaker: JERRY
segments.visual_cue: Close-up of TOM, frustration etched on his face.

segments.speaker: AREEBA
segments.line: Would you like a snack, sir? We have peanuts or pretzels.
segments.visual_cue: Close-up of JERRY, rummaging through his pocket for snacks.

segments.speaker: OWAI
segments.line: Remember, please fasten your seatbelts. We'll be hitting some turbulence.
segments.visual_cue: Close-up of AREEBA, smiling at Jerry.

segments.speaker: OWAI
segments.line: Don't worry, folks. We're going through a bit of turbulence. Just keep your seats and-
segments.visual_cue: Medium shot of OWAI, expression intense and focused.

segments.speaker: JERRY
segments.visual_cue: Medium shot of JERRY, expression intense and focused.

segments.speaker: TOM
segments.line: Stay calm, Jerry. We'll be fine.
segments.visual_cue: Close-up of JERRY, eyes wide with fear.

segments.speaker: AREEBA
segments.line: Can I get you a blanket, sir? Or a cup of water?
segments.visual_cue: Close-up of TOM, attempting to reassure Jerry.

segments.speaker: OWAI
segments.line: How's it looking, Areeba? Any signs of trouble?
segments.visual_cue: Medium shot of OWAI, expression intense and focused.

segments.speaker: AREEBA
segments.line: No, Captain. Everything's looking good. Just a bit of turbulence.
segments.visual_cue: Close-up of OWAI, focused on the controls.
